title: Bobstruct
description: A little mod to expand Minecraft's block palette.
body:
Bobstruct: Expanding the Minecraft Block Palette
Enhance your Minecraft experience with Bobstruct, a mod that adds a wide range of new blocks to spice up your building adventures.
With 592 new and missing blocks, including an array of stairs, slabs, walls, and exciting discoveries, Bobstruct tries to bring a new little wave of creativity and color into Minecraft's block palette.
Bobstruct is a Forge 1.19-1.19.2 Mod that requires installation on both the server and client sides.
 
 
Bobstruct supports these mods:
Ecologics
Biome O' Plenty
Quark
Selectable Paintings
Just Enough Painting Previews (JEPP)
 
 
 
As the sole developer and tester of Bobstruct, I greatly appreciate your support. Since I'm working on this project solo, I encourage you to report any bugs you come across during your gameplay experience. Your feedback is valuable and will help me improve the mod.
